title: joniris tenax
side_effects: Joniris tenax can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals due to its high concentration of alkaloids. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to respiratory problems, including asthma-like symptoms and bronchospasm. Additionally, Joniris tenax may interact with other medications, such as blood thinners, and decrease their effectiveness, increasing the risk of bleeding complications. Prolonged use or high doses of Joniris tenax can also cause liver damage and other organ dysfunctions if not monitored properly.
